creator: gerald@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: feedback->closed

Thanks for these tests and the update, Daniel!  I am thusly going to close 
this report.  As for the issue with the (lack of) fonts that you encountered, 
I now double checked the dependencies of this port and we should drag in all 
that is font-related so if the problem persists with the latest version of 
Wine that I committed earlier today even, this probably is something not 
FreeBSD-specific?
